scope.target: Source-only versus downstream-packaged test applicability contract
constraints: Keep source release and builder tests required in the source repository
Keep applicable target manifest and safe-apply checks packaged
Do not require excluded source release records, tags, or builder modules downstream

steps: Inventory every required command and its packaged dependencies
Classify source-only and downstream-supported tests explicitly
Correct profile, runner projection, and packaged README
Add extracted-package positive and missing-dependency negative fixtures
validation: Source full gate retains release/package-builder coverage
Profile inventory proves every selected command dependency is present
execution.next_action: Begin only after V041-002 establishes the candidate package shape.

results.residual_risk: Downstream packages still advertise and may select impossible source-only checks.
